fabrication.label: Fabrication Machinery
fabrication.heading: Metal forming & cutting machines built for production shops.

sheetTubeCombo.name: Sheet & Tube Combo Laser
sheetTubeCombo.description: Flat sheet and tube on one machine. 3–6 kW.

fourInOne.name: Laser Welding Machine
fourInOne.description: Handheld weld, cut, clean, wire-feed. 1.5–3 kW.

shearing.name: Guillotine & Swing Beam Shearing
shearing.description: Guillotine up to 16 mm. Swing beam up to 12 mm.

ironworker.name: Ironworker
ironworker.description: Punch, notch, shear, and bend in one machine.

automation.label: Robotic Automation
automation.heading: Welding automation that pays for itself in months, not years.

cobot.name: Collaborative Welding Arm
cobot.description: Deploy in 6 weeks. Works alongside humans safely.

precision.label: Precision
precision.title: Uncompromising Precision
precision.body: Tolerances down to ±0.05mm across every cut, bend, and weld. Our machines are calibrated before shipping and recalibrated on-site during installation. Your shop's output is only as good as the machines behind it — we make sure those machines never let you down.

partnership.label: Partnership
partnership.title: Fabrication to Automation — One Partner
partnership.body: Whether you're cutting your first sheet of metal or deploying your fifth cobot welding cell, VTM Tech Solutions handles the full arc of your production evolution. No need to juggle five vendors. We supply, install, train, and support — everything under one roof.

support.label: Support
support.title: Support That Doesn't Disappear After Delivery
support.body: Installation, calibration, operator training, and remote diagnostics — all included. Our US-based support team is reachable by phone, email, and video call. Spare parts ship same day. We measure our success by your uptime, not by your purchase order.

consultation.label: Consultation
consultation.title: Support That Starts Before You Buy
consultation.body: From your first question to final installation, our specialists work alongside you to spec the right machine for your production volume, material types, and floor space. We don't upsell — we right-size. Because a machine that fits your shop perfectly is the only one worth buying.

industries.label: Industries We Serve
industries.heading: Built for every corner of US metal manufacturing.

testimonials.label: Customer Stories
testimonials.heading: US shops already running on VTM.

t1.quote: We replaced three separate machines with one VTM fiber laser. The ROI was under 18 months.
t1.author: Mike Castellano

t2.quote: The installation team stayed 3 days to make sure we were cutting perfect parts. That's rare.
t2.author: Sarah Okonkwo

t3.quote: Our welding output doubled in the first month with the cobot arm.
t3.author: Carlos Restrepo
